description: 3 level townhome located minutes to shopping, restaurants, trails & lakes for the nature enthusiasts. This stylish 3 level home is built with GREEN construction with oversized windows to enjoy natural light at all times. The large sized bedrooms, granite counters, private rooftop deck are just some of the features you'll enjoy. Primary bedroom , 2nd bedroom & 2 bathrooms, & a short walk up to the 3rd level, to 3rd bedroom perfect for a private room, kids playroom or office that leads to the beautiful view from the massive rooftop deck. 2 parking underground in secure parkade.
